candidates.why: Appears in the current-liabilities section and represents the clean total of current interest-bearing debt, excluding leases which are shown separately.
Component of current debt; not needed when the current total interest-bearing liabilities line exists.
Component of current debt; not needed when the current total interest-bearing liabilities line exists.
Conceptually relevant candidate, but no visible values and less direct than the current total debt line.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist. It is in the current-liabilities section and is the clean total for current interest-bearing debt. Excluded 'Leasing liabilities' per STD rule and avoided component double counting with 'Loan from Financial institution' and 'Credit facility'.

candidates.why: Direct current tax payable/liability line on the balance sheet; better than the all-blank 'Income Taxes Payable' candidate.
Exact candidate wording but appears blank in preview; likely unused label variant.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist. 'Income tax liabilities' is the clear reported current tax payable line.
